animals.s: BBFAW 2024 Tier 3 — Aldi Süd / US division publishes farm-animal welfare policy with cage-free milestone reporting. CIWF Good Egg Award (US private label) — 100% cage-free shell-egg commitment. [BBFAW Tier 3 · CIWF Award · Cage-free fulfilled · MSC certified · ASC certified]

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

wiki.founded: (split in two parts in 1960, renamed to Aldi Nord and Aldi Süd in 1962)
wiki.hq: Essen, Germany (Aldi Nord) Mülheim, Germany (Aldi Süd)
wiki.revenue: Aldi Nord: 31 billion € (2025)Aldi Süd: 89 billion € (2024)Trader Joe's: 21.5 billion $ (2025)
wiki.extract:
Aldi (German pronunciation: [ˈaldiː] , stylised in all caps) is the common company brand name of two German multinational family-owned discount supermarket chains operating over 13,600 stores in 18 countries. The chain was founded by brothers Karl and Theo Albrecht in 1946, when they took over their mother's store in Essen. The business was split into two separate groups in 1960 that later became Aldi Nord (initially Northern West Germany), headquartered in Essen, and Aldi Süd (initially Southern West Germany), headquartered in neighbouring Mülheim.
In 1962, they introduced the name Aldi (a sy

sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was moving pallets when a pallet fell onto his ring finger causing a fingertip amputation.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A forklift struck an employee with its forks in a warehouse. The employee suffered a laceration to the lower left leg and a broken left ankle.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was looking into a trailer and stepped onto the pad between the dock and the trailer. The pad had ice on it, and the employee slipped off falling to the concrete. The employee sustained a fractured left ankle.

sampleRecords.employer: Baldi Candy Co. dba Arway Confections, Inc.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was purging the chocolate line when the machine caught fire. The employee sustained injuries due to smoke inhalation.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by forward-moving vehicle in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was carrying strawberries in an aisle when the wheel of a powered industrial truck (PIT) ran over their foot and fractured two toes. The employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecalls.title: Tempo USA Recalls Ambiano Electric Pressure Cookers Due to Serious Burn Hazard, Multiple Burn Injuries Reported; Sold at ALDI
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves all Ambiano electric pressure cookers with model numbers 93550 (KY-318B), 96775 (KY-318A), and 98527 (6L-PC). The electric pressure cookers and inner cooker pots are either six-quart or eight-quart capacity. The brand name Ambiano appears on the front of each unit and on its permanent on-product l…
hazards: The pressure-cooker lid can be opened before sufficient steam pressure has been released, causing hot contents to escape and posing a risk of burn injuries to …
injuries: The firm has received 11 reports of incidents, in which the contents were expelled under pressure, including eight reports of severe burn injuries.

sampleRecalls.title: Wuensche USA Recalls Ambiano Cotton Candy Makers Due to Fire Hazard; Sold at ALDI
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves all Ambiano Cotton Candy makers with model number 836098. The Cotton Candy makers have a red or teal base with a clear plastic cover. "Ambiano" and the model number are printed on the cotton candy maker's packaging and the bottom of the unit.
hazards: The heating element can cause sugar to ignite, if a consumer uses the product without the included sugar receptacle, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: The firm has received 12 reports of sparking or fire. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: ALDI Recalls Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers Due to Burn Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker. The coffee maker was sold in gray, blue, pink, and purple colors, and measures approximately L 11", W 4.7" and H 12." Ambiano is printed on the side of the coffee maker. Model numbers and UPC Codes on the rating label on the bottom of the unit: Product Name U…
hazards: The recalled coffee makers can expel hot water from the top of the machine, posing a burn hazard.
injuries: ALDI has received 25 reports of the recalled coffeemakers expelling hot water from the top of the machine, including three reports of burns.

sampleRecalls.title: Spalding® Momentous EZ Portable Basketball Goals Recalled by Russell Brands Due to Impact Injury Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Spalding Momentous EZ Assembly Portable Basketball Goals. The goals have a 50-inch or 54-inch acrylic clear backboard with a visible "H-frame" providing support behind the backboard, or a 54-inch acrylic clear backboard with aluminum trim, but no H-frame. All backboard styles are attached to a bla…
hazards: Welds in the arm attaching the backboard to the pole can fail and cause the backboard to fall, posing an impact injury hazard to consumers.
injuries: The firm has received 26 reports of weld failures including three backboards separating from the pole. One injury involving the backboard hitting a consumer on the shoulder/upper torso and one injury…
products: Spalding Momentous EZ Portable Basketball Goals
units: About 13,400 (In addition, about 62 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: ALDI Recalls Bee Happy 12 Days of Craft Advent Calendars Due to Violation of the Federal Lead Paint Ban and Lead Poisoning Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the ALDI, Inc. Bee Happy 12 Days of Craft Advent Calendar that contains 12 separate crafting activities separated by days. The crafts include ornaments, stickers, slime and other projects. The front of the box is illustrated as a house with multiple windows in a holiday setup. The recalled bell is…
hazards: Surface paint on the brown bell found in "Day 10" of the advent calendar contains levels of lead that exceed the federal lead paint ban, posing a risk of lead …
products: Bee Happy 12 Days of Craft Advent Calendars
